How Your Money Is Positioned
Current portfolio allocation strategy based on market regime (BULL/BEAR/NEUTRAL). Shows target % across Long Equity (buying stocks), Bear Call Spreads (bearish options), Iron Condors (range-bound options), Short Equity (inverse ETFs), and Cash. Adjusts automatically when regime changes.

Where Money Is Flowing Today
Daily performance of all 11 S&P 500 sectors. Blue = up, orange = down. Money rotating into defensives (utilities, staples) = bearish signal. Into growth (tech) = bullish.

📊 GEX — Gamma Exposure Map
--
Dealer Positioning Map
Shows where options dealers must hedge. Green zones = dealers buy dips (price gets pinned). Red zones = dealers sell dips (price accelerates). The Gamma Flip is THE key level — above it markets are calm, below it markets are volatile.

      -8.5%

      FEAR & GREED

      VIX
      —

      ⚔️ Worf's Defensive Arsenal — Inverse ETFs BEAR
      Defensive Weapons Locker
      Inverse ETFs that go UP when the market goes DOWN. Worf's recommended tools for bear market defense. SH (-1x) is safest for longer holds. -2x and -3x are day-trade weapons with high decay risk. Hover any ticker for details.
      ⚠️ Leveraged inverse ETFs (-2x, -3x) suffer from volatility decay. Hold for days, not weeks. SH (-1x) is safest for longer holds. VXX has EXTREME decay — short-term tactical only.

      Time Machine — Backtest
      Select a model and click "Run Backtest" to simulate the last 30 days.
      ⚔️ Worf's Inverse ETF Backtest
      Tests Worf's strategy: BUY inverse ETF when VIX>25 + SPY below 200MA + 50MA. EXIT when VIX<22 or SPY reclaims 200MA.
      Click "Run Backtest" to see results across SH, SDS, SQQQ, SDOW, TZA at 5-20% allocation.
